mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wiki_sources WHERE title = #{title} AND source_type = #{sourceType} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM wiki_sources ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM wiki_sources WHERE ingested = #{ingested} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_sources (title, source_type, file_path, content_hash, content, category, software, created_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{sourceType}, #{filePath}, #{contentHash}, #{content}, #{category}, #{software}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wiki_sources WHERE ingested = #{ingested}
